content: Spec 28 trace_id propagation: CommandExecuteOptions.traceId allows external callers to provide a trace ID (HTTP via X-Trace-Id header); CommandLayer reuses it via withTraceId(). Server-side onAfterHandle sets X-Trace-Id in all responses from AsyncLocalStorage active trace.

Health endpoint /health enrichment: when metricsCollector (InMemoryMetricsCollector) is provided, /health response includes metrics object with actionCount (action.executed + command.processed counters), ruleBlockCount, eventCount.
